scene.description: Engine 181 is supplying a wye with 200' of 2½" hose. Branch A is 150' of 1¾" flowing 150 GPM with a fog nozzle at 50 PSI. Branch B is 200' of 1¾" flowing 185 GPM with a fog nozzle at 50 PSI. What pump discharge pressure should the operator set?

hoses: 150' 1¾" Branch A from wye to front door
200' 1¾" Branch B from wye to side C entry
nozzles: Branch A fog nozzle, 150 GPM at 50 PSI
Branch B fog nozzle, 185 GPM at 50 PSI

problems.title: Residential Wye Split
problems.question: Engine 181 is supplying a wye with 200 ft of 2½-inch hose. Branch A is 150 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 150 GPM at 50 PSI. Branch B is 200 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 185 GPM at 50 PSI. Do not add appliance loss. What pump discharge pressure should the operator set for the governing branch?
formulaBreakdown: Branch A FL = 15.5 × (150 / 100)^2 × 1.5 ≈ 52 PSI; branch A total = 45 + 52 + 50 = 147 PSI.
Branch B FL = 15.5 × (185 / 100)^2 × 2 ≈ 106 PSI; branch B total = 45 + 106 + 50 = 201 PSI.
problems.instructorExplanation: For a wye operation, calculate the shared supply-line friction loss using total flow, then calculate each branch separately. Add the shared supply loss to each branch and use the highest-pressure branch as the governing pump discharge pressure.
problems.explainMistake: Do not add both branch pressures together. The main line carries total flow to the wye, but the pump discharge pressure is based on the highest-pressure path through the wye.

problems.title: Residential Wye Split
problems.question: Engine 181 is supplying a wye with 200 ft of 2½-inch hose. Branch A is 150 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 150 GPM at 50 PSI. Branch B is 150 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 185 GPM at 50 PSI. Do not add appliance loss. What pump discharge pressure should the operator set for the governing branch?
formulaBreakdown: Branch A FL ≈ 52 PSI; branch A total = 45 + 52 + 50 = 147 PSI.
Branch B FL = 15.5 × (185 / 100)^2 × 1.5 ≈ 80 PSI; branch B total = 45 + 80 + 50 = 175 PSI.
problems.instructorExplanation: For a wye operation, calculate the shared supply-line friction loss using total flow, then calculate each branch separately. Add the shared supply loss to each branch and use the highest-pressure branch as the governing pump discharge pressure.
problems.explainMistake: Do not add both branch pressures together. The main line carries total flow to the wye, but the pump discharge pressure is based on the highest-pressure path through the wye.

problems.title: Residential Wye Split
problems.question: Engine 181 is supplying a wye with 200 ft of 2½-inch hose. Branch A is 150 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 150 GPM at 50 PSI at ground level. Branch B is 200 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 185 GPM at 50 PSI and operates 40 ft above the pump. Use elevation pressure = height × 0.5 PSI/ft. Do not add appliance loss. What pump discharge pressure should the operator set for the governing branch?
formulaBreakdown: Branch B total = supply FL 45 + branch FL 106 + nozzle pressure 50 + elevation 20 = 221 PSI.
problems.instructorExplanation: For a wye operation, calculate the shared supply-line friction loss using total flow, then calculate each branch separately. Add the shared supply loss to each branch and use the highest-pressure branch as the governing pump discharge pressure.
problems.explainMistake: Do not add both branch pressures together. The main line carries total flow to the wye, but the pump discharge pressure is based on the highest-pressure path through the wye.

problems.title: Residential Wye Split
problems.question: Engine 181 is supplying a wye with 200 ft of 2½-inch hose. Branch A is 150 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 150 GPM at 50 PSI. Branch B is 200 ft of 1¾-inch hose flowing 185 GPM at 50 PSI. Add 10 PSI appliance loss for the wye and no elevation. What pump discharge pressure should the operator set for the governing branch?
problems.instructorExplanation: For a wye operation, calculate the shared supply-line friction loss using total flow, then calculate each branch separately. Add the shared supply loss to each branch and use the highest-pressure branch as the governing pump discharge pressure.
problems.explainMistake: Do not add both branch pressures together. The main line carries total flow to the wye, but the pump discharge pressure is based on the highest-pressure path through the wye.
